en: There was a man in the land of Uz whose name was Job, and that man was blameless and upright, one who feared God and turned away from evil.
zh: 烏斯地有一個人，名叫約伯。這人完全、正直，敬畏 神，遠離罪惡。

en: There were born to him seven sons and three daughters.
zh: 他生了七男三女。

en: He possessed 7,000 sheep, 3,000 camels, 500 yoke of oxen, and 500 female donkeys, and very many servants, so that this man was the greatest of all the people of the east.
zh: 他的家產有七千隻羊、三千匹駱駝、五百對牛、五百頭母驢，並且有許多僕婢。這人在全東方的人中至為尊貴。

en: His sons used to go and hold a feast in the house of each one on his day, and they would send and invite their three sisters to eat and drink with them.
zh: 他的兒子素常輪流各按自己的日子在家擺設筵席，並且打發人去邀請他們的三個姊妹來一同吃喝。

en: And when the days of the feast had run their course, Job would send and consecrate them, and he would rise early in the morning and offer burnt offerings according to the number of them all. For Job said, "It may be that my children have sinned, and cursed God in their hearts." Thus Job did continually.
zh: 輪流設宴的日子一過，約伯就差人去叫他們自潔。他清早起來，按他們的數目獻上燔祭。因為他心裡想：“說不定孩子犯了罪，心中褻瀆了 神。”約伯經常這樣作。

en: Now there was a day when the sons of God came to present themselves before the LORD, and Satan also came among them.
zh: 有一天， 神的眾子都來侍立在耶和華面前，撒但也來到他們中間。

en: The LORD said to Satan, "From where have you come?" Satan answered the LORD and said, "From going to and fro on the earth, and from walking up and down on it."
zh: 耶和華問撒但：“你從哪裡來？”撒但回答耶和華說：“我在地上徘徊，走來走去。”

en: And the LORD said to Satan, "Have you considered my servant Job, that there is none like him on the earth, a blameless and upright man, who fears God and turns away from evil?"
zh: 耶和華問撒但：“你有沒有注意到我的僕人約伯？世上再也沒有一個人像他那樣完全、正直，敬畏 神，遠離罪惡。”

en: Then Satan answered the LORD and said, "Does Job fear God for no reason?
zh: 撒但回答耶和華說：“約伯敬畏 神，難道是無緣無故的嗎？

en: Have you not put a hedge around him and his house and all that he has, on every side? You have blessed the work of his hands, and his possessions have increased in the land.
zh: 你不是在他四周圍上籬笆保護他嗎？他的家和他所有的一切，以及他手所作的，你都賜福，他的家產也在地上增添。

en: But stretch out your hand and touch all that he has, and he will curse you to your face."
zh: 只要你伸手打擊他所有的一切，他一定當面褻瀆你。”

en: And the LORD said to Satan, "Behold, all that he has is in your hand. Only against him do not stretch out your hand." So Satan went out from the presence of the LORD.
zh: 耶和華對撒但說：“好吧，他所有的一切都交在你手中，只是不可以伸手害他。”於是撒但從耶和華面前退去。

en: Now there was a day when his sons and daughters were eating and drinking wine in their oldest brother's house,
zh: 有一天，約伯的兒女正在他們長兄的家裡吃飯喝酒的時候，

en: and there came a messenger to Job and said, "The oxen were plowing and the donkeys feeding beside them,
zh: 有報信的來見約伯，說：“牛正在耕田，母驢在附近吃草的時候，

en: and the Sabeans fell upon them and took them and struck down the servants with the edge of the sword, and I alone have escaped to tell you."
zh: 示巴人忽然來侵襲，把牛驢擄去，又用刀殺了僕人，只有我一個人逃脫，來向你報告。”

en: While he was yet speaking, there came another and said, "The fire of God fell from heaven and burned up the sheep and the servants and consumed them, and I alone have escaped to tell you."
zh: 這個人還在說話的時候，又有人來說：“ 神的火從天上降下來，把群羊和僕人都燒光了，只有我一個人逃脫，來向你報告。”

en: While he was yet speaking, there came another and said, "The Chaldeans formed three groups and made a raid on the camels and took them and struck down the servants with the edge of the sword, and I alone have escaped to tell you."
zh: 他還在說話的時候，又有人來說：“迦勒底人分成三隊突襲駱駝，把牠們擄去，又用刀殺了僕人，只有我一個人逃脫，來向你報告。”

en: While he was yet speaking, there came another and said, "Your sons and daughters were eating and drinking wine in their oldest brother's house,
zh: 他還在說話的時候，又有人來說：“你的兒女正在他們長兄的家裡吃飯喝酒的時候，

en: and behold, a great wind came across the wilderness and struck the four corners of the house, and it fell upon the young people, and they are dead, and I alone have escaped to tell you."
zh: 沒想到有一陣狂風，從曠野那邊颳來，吹襲房屋的四角，房屋倒塌在年輕人身上，他們就都死了，只有我一個人逃脫，來向你報告。”

en: Then Job arose and tore his robe and shaved his head and fell on the ground and worshiped.
zh: 於是約伯起來，撕裂外袍，剃了頭，俯伏在地上敬拜，

en: And he said, "Naked I came from my mother's womb, and naked shall I return. The LORD gave, and the LORD has taken away; blessed be the name of the LORD."
zh: 說： “我赤身出於母胎， 也必赤身歸去。 賞賜的是耶和華，收回的也是耶和華； 耶和華的名是應當稱頌的。”

en: In all this Job did not sin or charge God with wrong.
zh: 在這一切事上，約伯並沒有犯罪，也沒有歸咎於 神。
